zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne於1176年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷奧納-素-維艾艾時，他的母親Guillemette de Comborn21歲，父親Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier26歲。他於1200年與Huguette de Chamalières結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1240年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dauphin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Emile, Antoine, Benoit, Carmelle, Fernand, Georges, Jean Claude, Laure, Luckner, Maryse.

French and Haitian: from the French personal name Dauphin, from Latin Delphinus, derived from Greek delphis ‘dolphin’. This name was borne by a 4th-century Christian saint who was bishop of Bordeaux, and from the early 12th century it was in use as a hereditary personal name in the family of the counts of Albon, so that it soon came to be used as a title and led to their territory (capital Grenoble) being known as the Dauphiné. When it became part of the Kingdom of France in 1349, the title of dauphin thereafter denoted the heir-apparent to the throne, and it is possible that in some cases this is the origin of the surname, either denoting a member of the Dauphin's household or applied as a nickname in the sense of ‘prince’.

variants.name: Dauphine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Aurelien.
French (Dauphiné): habitational name from the Dauphiné region of southeastern France (see Dauphin ).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne was born in 1176, in Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his mother, Guillemette de Comborn, was 21 and his father, Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier, was 26. He married Huguette de Chamalières in 1200. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1240, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne est né en 1176, à Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, sa mère, Guillemette de Comborn, avait 21 ans et son père, Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Huguette de Chamalières en 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1240, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne 1176 in Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Guillemette de Comborn 21 und sein Vater Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier 26. Er hat 1200 Huguette de Chamalières geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1240 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne è nato il nel 1176 nel Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo madre, Guillemette de Comborn, aveva 21 anni e il suo padre, Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Huguette de Chamalières nel 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1240, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergneが1176年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズオルグナク-スル-veズeアで生まれた時，母Guillemette de Combornは21歳，父Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ierは26歳であった。1200年にHuguette de Chamalièresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1240年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne(이)가 1176년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 르그나c-수-브e즈e르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Guillemette de Comborn(은)는 21세였고, 그의 아버지 Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1200년 Huguette de Chamalières(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne nasceu em 1176, em Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, sua mãe, Guillemette de Comborn, tinha 21 anos e seu pai, Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Huguette de Chamalières em 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1240, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne родился в 1176 г. в местности оргнак-сур-вeзeр, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его матери по имени Guillemette de Comborn было 21 год, а отцу, которого звали Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Huguette de Chamalières в 1200 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1240 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne nació en 1176, en Orgnac-sur-Vézère, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su mamá, Guillemette de Comborn, tenía 21 años y su papá, Robert Dauphin d'Auvergne Ier, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Huguette de Chamalières en 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1240, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
